description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth white exterior, adorned with an elaborate arrangement of pastel-colored icing flowers on the top. The floral decorations include large blue, white, and lavender roses, as well as smaller green and red accents resembling leaves and berries. The base of the cake is bordered with a brown icing band, interspersed with small purple and green floral motifs. The overall appearance is elegant and festive, with a focus on intricate piping work and a soft, inviting color palette. The cake appears to be made primarily of sponge cake and buttercream, with the floral decorations crafted from piped icing. It is suitable for celebratory occasions and would be visually striking in an urban bakery or outdoor event setting.
description: A round, single-tier cake with smooth white icing and elaborate pastel floral decorations on top and around the base. The cake features blue, white, and lavender roses with green leaves and red accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's white sides, brown icing base, and a prominent cluster of blue and white roses with green leaves on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the dense floral arrangement, with blue roses and green leaf details more centered and visible.
description_view_2: The left side reveals more lavender flowers and a slightly denser grouping of green and white dotted decorations.
description_view_3: The back view displays a balanced mix of blue and white roses, with the brown icing base and purple floral accents clearly visible.
